nasb.text: And I answered, ‘Who are You, Lord?’ And He said to me, ‘I am Jesus the Nazarene, whom you are persecuting.’

esv.text: And I answered, ‘Who are you, Lord?’ And he said to me, ‘I am Jesus of Nazareth, whom you are persecuting.’

cnv.text: 我回答：‘主啊，你是誰？’他說：‘我就是你所迫害的拿撒勒人耶穌。’

ccb.text: 我回答说，‘主啊，你是谁？’他说，‘我就是你迫害的拿撒勒人耶稣！’

csbs.text: “我回答：‘主啊！你到底是谁？’ “他说：‘我就是你所逼迫的拿撒勒人耶稣。’
